LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INCORPORATED, THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP INCORPORATED, AND KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION IS GRANTED AS TO ALL PLAINTIFFS AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 4. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 5 AS TO THE SPOUSE BECAUSE THE CLAIMS ARE ARBITRABLE UNDER EITHER HIS OWN OR THE DECEDENT'S AGREEMENT. DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 5 AS TO THE ADULT CHILDREN BECAUSE THOSE ARE INDEPENDENT CLAIMS HELD BY NON-SIGNATORIES. LITIGATION OF ALL CLAIMS IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION OF THE ARBITRABLE CLAIMS. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Appendix
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INCORPORATED, THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP INCORPORATED AND KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action IS GRANTED AS TO ALL PLAINTIFFS AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 4. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 5 AS TO THE SPOUSE BECAUSE THE CLAIMS ARE ARBITRABLE UNDER EITHER HIS OWN OR THE DECEDENT'S AGREEMENT. DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 5 AS TO THE ADULT CHILDREN BECAUSE THOSE ARE INDEPENDENT CLAIMS HELD BY NON-SIGNATORIES. LITIGATION OF ALL CLAIMS IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION OF THE ARBITRABLE CLAIMS. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
